introSection: Manta is a Bolliger & Mabillard flying roller coaster located at SeaWorld Orlando in Orlando, Florida, USA. The drop immediately follows with a pretzel loop. The ride allows guests to ride in the prone position. Near the end of the ride, there is a wing dip element right above the tank of several fish and rays.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On May 29, 2008, SeaWorld Orlando announced that they would be adding Manta.

Manta opened on May 22, 2009.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 32 riders per train.

fullText:
Manta is a Bolliger & Mabillard flying roller coaster located at SeaWorld Orlando in Orlando, Florida, USA. The drop immediately follows with a pretzel loop. The ride allows guests to ride in the prone position. Near the end of the ride, there is a wing dip element right above the tank of several fish and rays.

On May 29, 2008, SeaWorld Orlando announced that they would be adding Manta.

Manta opened on May 22, 2009.



3 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 32 riders per train.
